description: A single realistic whitetail deer standing in a neutral resting pose, viewed in a calm side-three-quarter stance, natural quadruped proportions, muted brown and tan coat with off-white belly and tail patch, darker fur along the spine, no antlers glow, no fantasy or tech elements, weathered and slightly desaturated coat texture
style: realistic semi-grounded 3D game art, mid-poly game-ready model, natural muted earth-tone palette, non-glossy weathered fur texture, consistent with a desaturated overgrown industrial facility environment, no cartoon or low-poly faceted stylization
